role: This directory contains policy and constraint definitions that enforce architectural rules and naming conventions for the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these components define and enforce domain isolation through layered architecture constraints, ensure proper dependency direction between layers, and mandate consistent naming conventions for interfaces and test files to maintain code quality and clarity.

children.role: Defines layered architecture constraints to enforce domain isolation and proper layer dependencies.
Naming convention policy document for the ArchSpine project
